headline: Is GE Aerospace (GE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on GE Aerospace on LongYield’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GE. GE Aerospace’s share was trading at $303.60 as of April 20th. GE’s trailing and forward P/E were 37.71 and 40.82 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
